name: sdxl-lightning
notes_low: Uses SDXL base with the 4-step/8-step Lightning LoRAs, tiled decode, detailer nodes, and conservative upscale settings.
notes_high: Adds refiner/inpaint-friendly workflows, detail LoRAs, face/hands detailer nodes, and larger tiled upscale paths.
description: Photographic SDXL Lightning pack for fast T2I, editing, inpaint, detail, and tiling workflows.
